name: IC-SCADA
description: Provider of next-gen SCADA, control, and OT solutions with consulting services focused on analyzing infrastructure, strategic planning, software implementation, tech support, and system integration.

name: Pro-Tech Systems Group
description: Expert industrial automation and control systems integration providing process automation, SCADA monitoring systems, custom control systems, easy-to-use software, and 3D scanning using IIoT for real-time data.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Customer service is second to none
Pro-Tech Systems Group has been there for my plants whenever we needed them, 24/7
We have even called them on a Christmas Day and they helped us get back online
Big or small projects we get the same top quality and service

sentiment.summary: Pro-Tech Systems Group has an excellent reputation for dependable 24/7 support, consistent quality service, and industry-leading customer responsiveness across all project sizes.

name: Team UIS
description: Utilities Instrumentation Service specializing in UIS SCADA, renewable power, and electrical studies.
